attributes.action: Give England more public holidays to bring equity across the UK countries.
attributes.additional_details:
England and Wales have 8 public holidays a year. 
Scotland have 9 public holidays a year. 
Northern Ireland have 10 public holidays a year.
I want equity on public holidays. Why can't England, Wales and Scotland have additional public holidays to bring them into line with Northern Ireland?
attributes.background:
England and Wales have 8 public holidays a year. 
Scotland have 9 public holidays a year. 
Northern Ireland have 10 public holidays a year.
I want equity on public holidays. Why can't England, Wales and Scotland have additional public holidays to bring them into line with Northern Ireland?

rejection.details: You may wish to sign this petition, which calls for similar action: "Increase the number of bank holidays in England & Wales to 10 days" https://petition.parliament.uk/petitions/746816
